palette_hint: dark charcoal background (#1e1a18), warm off-white text (#f0ebe3), burnt orange accent (#c95f2a) and a secondary muted tan (#a68b6e)
type_style: system sans-serif headings (bold, all-caps, wide letter-spacing), system serif body text, rugged and direct feel
description: A no-frills Texas-style BBQ smokehouse website — dark, bold, text-driven, celebrating slow-smoked meats and honest cooking.
constraints: centered single-column layout with max-width of 660px
all section headings in all-caps with 0.12em letter-spacing and burnt orange color (#c95f2a)
thin 1px horizontal rules in muted tan (#a68b6e) separating every section
navigation bar as plain all-caps text links on a slightly lighter charcoal strip (#2a2420), active page underlined in burnt orange
no images, no icons, no decorative borders — raw typography only

page_specs.menu: Divided into four sections — Smoked Meats, Sides, Sandwiches, and Drinks — each listing 4–5 items with the item name in bold, a one-line plain-English description in body serif, and the price flush right. A note at the bottom reads 'Sold by the pound. Market price on brisket. Plates served with two sides.'
page_specs.pitmaster: Three paragraphs about head pitmaster Darnell 'Smoke' Okafor: his roots in Lockhart, Texas, his 18-hour oak-wood smoking method, and his philosophy that BBQ needs no sauce to speak for itself. His name and title appear below in burnt orange as a byline.
page_specs.find-us: Full street address of the restaurant (4812 Cinder Road, Amarillo, TX 79101) in large bold type, followed by a short paragraph with parking and landmark directions. Below that, a plain-text note about the nearest cross street and bus stop.
page_specs.hours: A plain vertical list of operating days and hours: Tuesday through Thursday 11am–8pm, Friday and Saturday 11am–9pm, Sunday 11am–6pm, closed Monday. A brief note underneath warns that the kitchen closes when the meat sells out, usually by early evening on weekends.
page_specs.catering: A short introductory paragraph explaining that Ember & Rye handles off-site events for 20 to 300 guests with full pit setup. Below that, a bulleted plain-text list of five package tiers with names and per-head price ranges. Ends with a phone number in large bold type and an email address for inquiries.
